name: Venty Seal Ring Set
summary: Ensure peak functionality of your Venty vaporiser with regular replacement of its seal rings.
description: Ensure peak functionality of your Venty vaporiser with regular replacement of its seal rings. This set contains all the required rings for the Venty model. Designed for use specifically with the Venty Vaporiser. This trusted information is sourced from the manufacturer. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
